final:
module matrix_mult (
    input [7:0] X_A11, A12, A21, A22,
    input [7:0] B11, B12, B21, B22,
    output reg [15:0] C11, C12, C21, C22
);
    always @(*) begin
        C11 = X_A11 * B11 + A12 * B21; // First row, first column
        C12 = X_A11 * B12 + A12 * B22; // First row, second column
        C21 = A21 * B11 + A22 * B21; // Second row, first column
        C22 = A21 * B12 + A22 * B22; // Second row, second column
    end
endmodule
